sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bill extends Supplier Payments Plus solution to speed up transactions
feed.summary: Bill has announced an extended partnership with Visa to enhance its Supplier Payments Plus solution. This collaboration aims to provide faster transaction speeds and improved cash flow management for businesses, leveraging Visa Direct to accelerate payments to suppliers. The updated solution will help businesses optimize their payment processes.

feed.title: What will Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) hit Week of April 13 2026? Trading Odds & Predictions (Apr. 10, 2026)

Traders can buy "Yes" or "No" shares on various price levels, with resolution determined by 1-minute candle prices during regular trading hours, sourced from Pyth. The market aims to provide crowd-sourced probabilities for MSFT's price movements.

feed.title: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:AREB) Short Interest Down 83.7% in March
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:AREB) experienced a significant 83.7% decline in short interest in March, bringing the total to 37,648 shares. Despite a new institutional investment by CWA Asset Management Group LLC, the stock remains highly volatile with a large price range, and analysts maintain a "Sell" rating. The company designs and markets safes and personal security products.

feed.title: What’s going on with the Bally’s Chicago construction timeline?
feed.summary: Bally's Chicago's permanent casino faces an uncertain future as its September 9, 2026 deadline for opening, and thus the continued operation of its temporary casino, rapidly approaches. A bill (HB 4437) has been introduced to extend the temporary license, with Bally's citing operational certainty and economic contributions. Construction has faced difficulties, and the recent legalization of Video Gaming Terminals (VGTs) in Chicago could further impact Bally's revenue, though key stakeholder GLPI remains unconcerned about the timeline.

feed.title: Halliburton, PETRONAS, Valaris Sign Strategic Agreement for Suriname Energy Development
feed.summary: Halliburton, PETRONAS Suriname Exploration & Production BV, and Valaris have formed a strategic collaboration to develop offshore assets in Suriname. This agreement aims to integrate planning, subsurface evaluation, and execution strategies early in the project lifecycle, combining the expertise of all three companies to enhance efficiency and maximize project value. The partnership will focus on utilizing digital well construction technologies and integrated subsurface data for better planning and informed decision-making in the growing offshore energy market of South America.

feed.title: IBM to Settle False Claims Allegations for Over $17 Million
feed.summary: IBM has agreed to pay over $17 million to settle allegations under the False Claims Act, specifically for failing to comply with anti-discrimination mandates in its federal contracts. This resolution, part of the Civil Rights Fraud Initiative, highlights corporate accountability in maintaining fair workplace practices. Despite these challenges, IBM, a long-standing technology giant, shows strong profitability and growth, with a GF Score™ of 83/100 and recent insider buying activity.

feed.title: [Form 3] Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. Initial Statement of Beneficial Ownership
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. has filed an initial Form 3 for Rafael Oliveira, CEO of its Coffee Operating Unit, identifying him as a reporting person but not a director or ten percent owner. The filing indicates no securities are beneficially owned by him. This SEC document serves to officially record his status as an insider for future reporting requirements.

feed.title: Targa Resources: This Stock Has Performed Well, But Still Has Potential Today (NYSE:TRGP)
feed.summary: Targa Resources (TRGP) is well-positioned for growth, primarily due to its strong presence in the Permian Basin midstream sector and a volume-driven business model. The company's future expansion is supported by several new gas processing plants and the Speedway NGL Pipeline, with significant impacts anticipated in 2027–2028. Despite a premium valuation and a modest dividend yield of 1.63%, TRGP's stable cash flow growth, backed by new projects, suggests a potential "Hold" or "weak Buy" rating.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Scott Pintoff Sells Shares of MarketAxess Holdings Inc (MKTX)
feed.summary: Scott Pintoff, General Counsel and Secretary at MarketAxess Holdings Inc (MKTX), sold 100 shares of the company on April 10, 2026, reducing his holdings to 11,986 shares. Over the past year, Pintoff has sold a total of 500 shares, with no insider buys recorded for MKTX during the same period. The stock is currently trading at $171.96, significantly undervalued according to its GF Value of $253.60, despite a P/E ratio higher than the industry median.

feed.title: KLA Corporation stock (US4824801009): Is its process control dominance strong enough for AI chip boom upside?
feed.summary: KLA Corporation is a critical enabler in the semiconductor industry, providing process control and yield management solutions essential for chipmakers, especially with the surge in AI-driven demand and investments in U.S. chip fabs. The company's unique focus on yield improvement and its robust product portfolio in inspection and metrology give it a strong competitive edge against rivals. With significant exposure to U.S. markets and strong analyst backing, KLA Corporation is positioned as a strategic investment for those looking to capitalize on the AI boom and increased domestic semiconductor production, despite potential risks from market cyclicality and geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: Cook County jury awards total of $70 million in damages in cases against Abbott over infant formula
feed.summary: A Cook County jury has awarded a total of $70 million in damages against Abbott Laboratories in four cases alleging its infant formula for premature babies caused necrotizing enterocolitis (NEC). This includes $53 million in compensatory damages and an additional $17 million in punitive damages. Abbott plans to appeal, arguing that "science was ignored" and the verdict could impact the availability of vital products for premature infants.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) CFO logs pre-planned sale of 1,419 common shares
feed.summary: Jeffrey Howie, EVP and CFO of Williams-Sonoma (WSM), sold 1,419 common shares on April 8, 2026, through a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The sales occurred at prices ranging from approximately $186.55 to $193.41 per share. Following these transactions, Howie directly retains ownership of 34,138 shares, indicating the sale was a small portion of his total equity.

feed.title: Stay safe while gardening and landscaping: Call 8-1-1 before you dig
feed.summary: Xcel Energy urges customers to call 8-1-1 before any digging projects for spring planting or landscaping. This is especially important during April, which is National Safe Digging Month, to prevent damage to underground utility lines, which resulted in 106 incidents in 2025 across Minnesota, North Dakota, and South Dakota. Calling 8-1-1 ensures utility lines are marked free of charge, protecting against injuries, property damage, outages, and fines.

feed.title: Axis Capital Holdings Ltd (AXS) Stock Down 4.2% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 84/100
feed.summary: Axis Capital Holdings Ltd (AXS) shares dropped 4.2%, continuing a year-to-date decline, and are currently trading at $98.14. Despite a strong GF Score of 84/100 indicating solid fundamentals in growth and momentum, the stock is considered overvalued, trading 6.2% above its GF Value of $92.42. The absence of insider transactions over the past three months may suggest a lack of immediate catalysts from company insiders.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Evaluates Venezuela Drilling Return in 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips is evaluating the possibility of resuming drilling operations in Venezuela in 2026, sending personnel to assess potential oil and gas opportunities. This move comes as the company prioritizes recovering funds owed from the 2007 nationalization of its assets, even as the U.S. President has called for American drillers to help revive Venezuela's oil sector. Exxon Mobil Corp. is also assessing opportunities in the country, highlighting the complexity and financial commitment required to rebuild Venezuela's oil output.

feed.title: Is Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc (ARE) a Bargain After 3.1% Drop? GF Value Says Undervalued
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc (ARE) experienced a 3.1% stock drop, making its shares significantly undervalued according to GuruFocus' GF Value estimate. While the stock's GF Score of 62/100 indicates above-average potential with strong profitability, its high P/E ratio and "possible value trap" label suggest risks that investors should carefully consider. Insider buying activity signals some confidence, but thorough research is recommended due to mixed financial metrics and valuation concerns.

feed.title: CarMax Inc (KMX) Stock Up 3.1% and Still Undervalued -- GF Score: 63/100
feed.summary: CarMax Inc (KMX) shares increased by 3.1% to $46.72, signaling the stock is undervalued by 36.2% compared to its GF Value™ of $73.25. Despite a GF Score™ of 63/100, indicating above-average potential for long-term returns, the company faces significant challenges with a low Financial Strength rating of 3/10 and Growth rating of 2/10, leading to a "Possible Value Trap" warning. Investors are advised to consider these financial weaknesses alongside the attractive valuation before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Lamb Weston Announces Inducement Award Under NYSE Listing Rule 303A.08
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) announced it granted 37,923 restricted stock units to James D. Gray as an inducement to his hiring as Chief Financial Officer on April 2, 2026. The awards vest 50% on April 13, 2027, and April 11, 2028, and were granted under the company's 2026 Inducement Stock Plan in reliance on NYSE Listing Rule 303A.08.

feed.title: A Look at Jack Henry & Associates Inc (JKHY) After 4.1% Decline -- GF Value $192.83 vs Price $147.20
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates Inc (JKHY) recently saw a 4.1% stock decline, bringing its price to $147.20, significantly below its GF Value™ of $192.83, indicating it is undervalued. The company holds a strong GF Score™ of 98/100, driven by high profitability and financial strength, suggesting potential for long-term returns despite recent market challenges. There have been no insider transactions in the last three months, implying stable management confidence in the company's prospects.

feed.title: Aeroméxico to Host Q1 2026 Earnings Call on April 22
feed.summary: Grupo Aeroméxico will host its Q1 2026 earnings call on April 22, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. Mexico City Time to discuss operating and financial performance. The company will release its Q1 earnings results after market close on April 21, 2026. A live webcast and replay will be available for investors and analysts to review the key business drivers and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Snap and Qualcomm expand XR collaboration
feed.summary: Snap's new XR subsidiary, Specs Inc., has formed a multi-year strategic partnership with Qualcomm to power its next-generation AR glasses with Snapdragon XR chips. This collaboration, building on over five years of work, emphasizes on-device AI for more natural, private, and context-aware AR experiences. The partnership provides Specs Inc. a technical edge and reliable silicon supply, while Qualcomm gains a design win in the growing AR eyewear segment, aiming to move AR from niche applications to mainstream consumer use.

feed.title: AT&T Inc stock (US00206R1023): Is its wireless dominance strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: AT&T's core wireless and broadband businesses are crucial for its revenue, with significant investments in its 5G network. The company's strategic focus on connectivity and streamlined operations aims to provide stability and returns for U.S. investors, making it a defensive holding. However, it faces risks from intense competition, high debt, and regulatory scrutiny.

feed.title: ASML Set To Report Q1 Earnings: What to Expect?
feed.summary: ASML Holding (ASML.US) is set to release its Q1 2026 financial results on April 15, with investors looking to see if AI demand can counteract China export restrictions. Wall Street anticipates EPS between $7.20 and $7.68 and revenue of EUR 8.2-8.9 billion, aligning with company guidance. An earnings conference call is scheduled for April 15 at 9:00 AM ET.

feed.title: Headset free AR VR platform transforms STEM learning, Zspace Inc. claims
feed.summary: Zspace Inc. has launched a new augmented and virtual reality platform designed to provide immersive STEM and career learning experiences without requiring headsets. This technology aims to make hands-on, interactive education more accessible and engaging for students. The company positions its solution as a significant advancement in educational technology, enhancing practical learning in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics for schools and institutions.

feed.title: Barings Global Short Duration High Yield Fund (BGH) Announces Monthly Dividend
feed.summary: Barings Global Short Duration High Yield Fund (BGH) announced a monthly dividend of $0.1223 per share, maintaining consistency with previous payments and offering a forward yield of 10.56%. Despite the attractive dividend, the fund's GF Score™ of 47/100 and financial strength rating of 3/10 suggest potential concerns for investors. Its P/E ratio of 13.92, near its historical high, indicates a moderate to possibly overvalued position relative to earnings.

feed.title: ASML (NASDAQ:ASML) Trading Up 2% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: ASML (NASDAQ:ASML) saw its stock rise by 2% on Friday, reaching an intraday high of $1,502.50. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $3.1771, resulting in an annualized dividend of $12.71 and a yield of approximately 0.9%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for ASML, with an average price target of $1,482.50, and Sanford C. Bernstein recently boosted its target to $1,971.

feed.title: Humana (HUM) Elects Robert Field to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Humana Inc. (HUM) announced the appointment of Robert Field to its Board of Directors, a strategic move to enhance its healthcare sector expertise. Field, principal of nMed Capital Management, brings significant experience in healthcare services investments. The company, a major U.S. health insurer, holds a P/E ratio of 19.55 and a GF Score of 70/100, indicating solid performance with strong growth potential despite areas for financial strength improvement.

feed.title: Rollins Inc. stock (US7757111049): Is its pest control dominance strong enough for steady U.S. investor gains?
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. (US7757111049) leads the U.S. pest control market with a recurring revenue model driven by essential services, making it a resilient investment tied to American consumer spending and real estate. The company's strategy focuses on organic growth, strategic acquisitions, and technological integration within a growing market influenced by urbanization and climate change. Analysts view Rollins as a high-quality compounder with defensive growth, though risks like weather volatility, labor shortages, and regulatory changes require monitoring.

feed.title: Is GE (GE) Turning Governance Scrutiny Into a Strategic Advantage for Its Aerospace Story?
feed.summary: A recent governance dispute concerning GE Aerospace's defense business and sales to the Israel Defense Forces has sparked debate among shareholders. While this adds "governance noise," the article suggests GE's strong financial performance, including recent earnings beats and raised guidance, remains the primary driver of its investment narrative. Investors are advised to consider the company's concentrated exposure to commercial aviation and ongoing supply chain pressures, despite its robust cash generation and buyback program.

feed.title: Barings Global Short Duration High Yield Fund declares $0.1223 dividend
feed.summary: Barings Global Short Duration High Yield Fund (BGH) has announced a monthly dividend of $0.1223 per share. This declaration provides investors with details regarding the fund's upcoming dividend distribution.

feed.title: Axsome Therapeutics (AXSM) Is Up 6.2% After Highlighting Key FDA Decision on Auvelity
feed.summary: Axsome Therapeutics (AXSM) saw a 6.2% stock increase following its announcement of first-quarter 2026 results and an upcoming FDA decision on Auvelity for Alzheimer's agitation. Analysts anticipate this new indication could be a significant revenue stream, considering the high unmet medical need and the drug's existing antidepressant classification potentially avoiding an added mortality boxed warning. The FDA ruling is a key near-term catalyst that could impact Axsome’s revenue mix, cash burn, and reliance on its core products.

feed.title: Allogene Therapeutics to Announce Interim Futility Analysis Data from its Pivotal Phase 2 ALPHA3 Trial with Cemacabtagene Ansegedleucel (Cema-Cel) in First-Line Consolidation LBCL on Monday, April 13, 2026
feed.summary: Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. announced it will host a conference call and webcast on Monday, April 13, 2026, to review interim futility analysis data from its pivotal Phase 2 ALPHA3 trial. This trial evaluates cemacabtagene ansegedleucel (cema-cel) in first-line consolidation large B-cell lymphoma (LBCL). The company, a clinical-stage biotechnology firm, specializes in developing allogeneic CAR T products for cancer and autoimmune diseases.

feed.title: AAFRF Analyst Rating Maintained at Overweight by Barclays April 2026
feed.summary: Barclays has maintained its Overweight rating on Airtel Africa Plc (AAFRF) and increased its price target from 350 GBp to 360 GBp, signaling continued confidence in the telecom operator's growth in Africa. The stock has already seen a 1.92% gain following this announcement, reflecting positive investor sentiment. This move suggests Barclays believes AAFRF offers attractive entry points and will deliver steady growth.

feed.title: Assessing Applied Materials (AMAT) Valuation After New AI Chip Deposition Systems Lift Market Confidence
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) recently launched two new deposition systems for 2nm Gate All Around AI chips, which has boosted market confidence and the stock's performance. Despite a strong 1-year total return of 178.10% and trading near $399.50, some analyses suggest the stock is overvalued, with a fair value estimated around $194.11. Investors are encouraged to consider the balance of risks and rewards, including potential changes in export controls or typical semiconductor downcycles, and to conduct further research before making investment decisions.

feed.title: [Form 4] Mission Produce, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Mission Produce, Inc. Director Jay A. Pack reported an acquisition of 8,240 restricted stock units (RSUs) of common stock as non-cash compensation. These RSUs, granted under the Non-Employee Director Compensation Program, vest on the earlier of one year or the next Annual Meeting, contingent on continued board service. Mr. Pack has deferred distribution until separation of service, and now holds 403,965 direct common shares and additional indirect holdings.

feed.title: Mission Produce (AVO) grants CEO 42,071 RSUs vesting 2027-2029
feed.summary: Mission Produce, Inc. (AVO) CEO John Pawlowski was granted 42,071 restricted stock units (RSUs) as compensation under the 2020 Incentive Award Plan. These RSUs will vest in three equal installments on April 9, 2027, 2028, and 2029, contingent on his continued employment. Following this grant, Pawlowski's direct holdings in the company's common stock now total 121,267 shares.

feed.title: Mission Produce (NASDAQ: AVO) director receives 8,240-share RSU equity grant
feed.summary: Mission Produce (NASDAQ: AVO) director Douglas M. Stone was granted 8,240 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of the company's Non-Employee Director Compensation Program. This equity grant, with a value of $0.00 per share, increases his direct holdings to 11,637 shares. The RSUs are set to vest one year from the grant date or at the next Annual Meeting, contingent on his continued board service.

feed.title: AeroVironment (NASDAQ:AVAV) Trading 1.1% Higher - Here's Why
feed.summary: AeroVironment (NASDAQ:AVAV) saw its stock price rise by 1.1% during mid-day trading despite recent struggles. The company missed its latest quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, and its stock has plunged 52% over the past three months due to rising costs, competition, and an investor probe. Analysts, however, still maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $318.78.

feed.title: 5 Best Software Penny Stocks to Buy Now
feed.summary: This article lists the top 5 best software penny stocks to consider buying now, with an extended list available. It highlights Yext Inc. (NYSE: YEXT) as one of the key players, discussing its recent financial performance, analyst ratings, and strategic positioning in the agentic marketing space. The content also features an unrelated promotional section about an AI investment opportunity.

feed.title: Algoma Steel Sets June 23, 2026 Date for Annual Meeting and Confirms Record Date
feed.summary: Algoma Steel Group (TSE:ASTL) has announced that its annual shareholder meeting will be held on June 23, 2026, with May 4, 2026, designated as the record date for voting and beneficial ownership. The company emphasized broad shareholder participation by committing to cover the costs of delivering proxy materials to both non-objecting and objecting beneficial owners. An AI analyst from TipRanks, Spark, has rated ASTL as a "Neutral" due to weakened financial performance, despite some positive indicators like liquidity and inventory reductions.

feed.title: Will New Englanders get $1.5 billion in electricity refunds? Utilities say: Not so fast.
feed.summary: Federal regulators ordered a dozen New England utilities to refund $1.5 billion to ratepayers, citing overcharges on transmission projects dating back to 2011. However, the utilities, led by Eversource and Avangrid, are pushing back, requesting more time to process the refunds and asking for a complete stay on the order pending legal appeals. They argue that a forced refund could harm their credit ratings, increase borrowing costs, and lead to "rate whiplash" for consumers.

feed.title: Alpha Modus Announces Share Exchange Amid Nasdaq Compliance Effort
feed.summary: Alpha Modus Holdings (AMOD) is exchanging 3,870,000 Series C preferred shares for over 109 million Class A common shares with CEO William Alessi's family trust. This equity restructuring aims to boost the company’s market value and reduce its stockholders’ deficit. The move comes as a response to an April 6, 2026 Nasdaq notice indicating that Alpha Modus no longer meets minimum listing standards.

feed.title: Live Nation antitrust trial nears end as lawyer for 34 states labels the concerts giant a monopolist
feed.summary: The antitrust trial against Live Nation Entertainment and Ticketmaster is nearing its end, with a lawyer for 34 states arguing that the company monopolizes the concert industry and inflates prices. Live Nation's lawyer countered, stating that the company's success is due to hard work and that the market is more competitive than ever. Jurors are expected to begin deliberations soon after closing arguments concluded.

feed.title: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) Shares Down 3.6% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE: VZ) shares dropped 3.6% during Friday's trading, closing at $46.0550 with lower-than-average volume, despite recent positive momentum. The article highlights positive catalysts such as bullish options flow, analyst upgrades, and a dividend increase, alongside risks like a DBS downgrade, governance issues with activists, and notable insider selling. MarketBeat maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $50.56, but advises considering other top-rated stocks.

feed.title: Cisco in Talks to Buy AI Security Startup Astrix for at Least $250 Million
feed.summary: Cisco is reportedly in discussions to acquire Astrix, an AI security startup, for at least $250 million. This potential acquisition highlights Cisco's continued interest in strengthening its security offerings, particularly in the growing field of AI defense. The move could significantly impact the competitive landscape of the cybersecurity market.

feed.title: Will American Express (AXP) beat quarterly earnings? Pred...
feed.summary: This Polymarket prediction market focuses on whether American Express (AXP) will report GAAP EPS greater than $3.99 for its next quarterly earnings, estimated to be released on April 23, 2026. The market will resolve to "Yes" if AXP's GAAP EPS exceeds this figure, using the company's official earnings documents or SeekingAlpha as resolution sources. Key rules cover scenarios like delayed earnings, restatements, and the treatment of IFRS EPS and diluted/basic GAAP EPS.

feed.title: Alpha Modus enters share exchange with CEO trust and receives Nasdaq delisting notice
feed.summary: Alpha Modus Holdings, Inc. has announced an exchange agreement with its CEO's family trust, converting preferred stock into common stock to increase market value and reduce stockholder deficit. Concurrently, the company received a Nasdaq delisting notice for failing to meet minimum financial standards, giving them 45 days to submit a compliance plan. This news follows recent developments including a new patent for real-time personalized marketing and the appointment of a Head of Delivery for its financial services subsidiary.

feed.title: Zhibao Technology Raises Up to $6.67 Million via Senior Secured Convertible Notes
feed.summary: Zhibao Technology Inc. secured up to $6.67 million through a private placement of senior secured convertible notes, with an initial $3.33 million tranche closing on April 10, 2026. These one-year notes bear 7% interest and convert into Class A shares at $0.87 per share, while imposing anti-dilution provisions and participation rights for the investor. This financing aims to address the company's capital needs but introduces tighter capital-structure constraints and potential equity dilution for existing shareholders.
